sql_array: CREATE TABLE test.regex_test (EventDate Date, Description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY EventDate;
INSERT INTO test.regex_test (EventDate, Description) VALUES (toDate('2023-10-01'), 'Sample Event');
UPDATE test.regex_test SET Description = replaceRegexpOne(Description, 'Event', 'Example') WHERE EventDate = toDate('2023-10-01');
SELECT EventDate, replaceRegexpOne(Description, 'Sample', 'Demonstration') AS UpdatedDescription FROM test.regex_test;
SELECT replaceRegexpOne(toString(EventDate), '(\\d{4})-(\\d{2})-(\\d{2})', '\\2/\\3/\\1') AS FormattedDate FROM test.regex_test;
